Introduction
Welcome to module six. This is the last full out module and this one is absolutely
packed with great stuff. First, we’re going to cover your sales video. Again, you don’t
have to do a sales video. You could do a sales letter. But most people are going to find
that sales video is actually easier to do, it’s easier to be authentic in your message and
just generally works a little better. In any case I’m going to walk you through a couple
of real-life examples of sales videos from very successful launches and you’re going to
see that you don’t have to be some amazing sales person to do this.
Then, after we go through the whole sales video, I’m going to walk you through
the joint venture launches. The deal to join venture launches is that, the analogy I like
it’s like pouring gasoline on a fire, because in the joint venture launch also you can tap
into the power of other people’s lists. You’ll see how you get joint venture partners, and
how you can do one of those launches to get massive leverage with your JB launch.
Now, again, of course you don’t have to do a JV launch. I’ve got lots of PLF
owners who’ve done great without ever doing one. But it’s something you’re going to
want to learn about, because it can be very, very powerful.
We have a lot of ground to cover in this module, but I want you to remember,
and you’ve heard me say this before, it’s all about the baby steps. You just need to take
it one video at a time, go through one video at a time and just keep on making that
incremental progress. Because the incremental progress just adds up to exponential
gain and exponential progress in the long run. You’ve got to start where you’re at and
you take one step at a time.
Of course if you’re still with me at this point then you’ve heard that before, and if
you’re still with me at this point then you win. I love all my PLF owners. But the fact
that you made it to module six here, I have to tell you that the vast majority of people
will never get that far. They’ll never stick with it, they’ll never make it this far into the
program, they’ll never see this video. You are one of a very select, select number. Just
stop and think about how awesome you are. Congratulations on making it this far. It
really is a big deal. Now it’s time to push forward, it’s time to finish this module up and
put your launch together.
Remember, this product launch formula is a proven formula. It’s been proven
thousands of times. You’ve already put in most of the work here. Now you just need to
keep on taking those baby steps and put your launch together.
What I want you to do now is just scroll down and leave a comment for me,
because it is a big deal that you’ve made it here, that you’re here in module six with
me. Tell me that you’ve made it all the way to module six. I really want to hear it from
you. I really want to be able to see who you are. The thing is I have all these people
signed up for Product Launch Formula and over the years I have gotten to know several
